statement: CoreWeave on-demand price for an NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 instance (4 GPUs) is $42.00 per instance-hour in North America; page states per-instance pricing, not per-GPU; static level, no baseline stated.
why: Current rental price level for NVIDIA's GB200 NVL72 class on a major neocloud; feeds the price overlay for latest-generation GPU capacity.

impact.mechanism: On-demand GB200 instance price level serves as a display overlay reference for GPU market conditions; no baseline stated, so no momentum inferred.

confidence.basis: Secondary open-web pricing page read on 2026-07-03; per-single-GPU basis not confirmed by the page.
